items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of 'Payout-ready affiliate ledger and statement exports', but there is no direct evidence provided that addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for these exports, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to the affiliate ledger or statement exports. This indicates a gap in the validation process, leading to an inconclusive status.
